objective: Decision required from VS/operator: choose recovery strategy for recurring autopilot git sync rejection on main (remote cannot lock ref during competing pushes). Confirm one path: (A) pause ubuntu heartbeat pushes and keep operator-only heartbeat, (B) move ubuntu heartbeat to a dedicated branch and mirror status into state files, or (C) keep single-branch heartbeat with serialized push lock and exponential backoff. Provide decision and acceptance criteria so worker can implement without policy ambiguity.
